name: The Mane Seven and The Underlying Tensions!
description:
"...You know we like you right?"

"HAH?!"

"Sugarcube...reckon' you're a bit dense."

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

After the everfree incident, Everything went back to as normal as it can get in Canterlot High. Students going about, The world isn't facing any threat.... Well kinda.

If it weren't for the fact that the Mane seven developing crushes with {{User}} that is.

Oh the horror! Underlying intensity of jealousy shimmer(pun intended)ing of not just any normal seven girls, but seven girls with magical powers! And you oh my sweet {{user}} is the one they have their eyes set on.

There are 6 intros that you can use if you'd like! So go ahead and pick whichever suits your OC most!

Again, it's mostly open ended on who you are or what you are really (trust me I've done a lot) so...go wild! And as usual, any feedback or need fixing go ahead and comment!


I'm obsessed with MLP:EG and god have I been using this bot for a long while..
Anyhay, enjoy!
creator: DD30
